debug_info.goal:
α : Type u_1
β : Type u_2
γ : Type u_3
inst✝ : TopologicalSpace α
x : α
p p' q q' : α → Prop
hT : {x | p x} ∈ nhds x
hT' : {x | p' x} ∈ nhds x
hS : {x | q x} ∈ nhds x
hS' : {x | q' x} ∈ nhds x
⊢ {x | p x ∧ q x ∨ p' x ∧ q' x} ∈ nhds x

have h1 : {x | p x ∧ q x} ∈ 𝓝 x := by
    have h2 : {x | p x} ∈ 𝓝 x := hT
    have h3 : {x | q x} ∈ 𝓝 x := hS
    have h4 : {x | p x ∧ q x} = {x | p x} ∩ {x | q x} := by
      ext y
      simp [Set.mem_setOf_eq, Set.mem_inter_iff]
    rw [h4]
    exact Filter.mem_inter hT hS
  have h1' : {x | p' x ∧ q' x} ∈ 𝓝 x := by
    have h2' : {x | p' x} ∈ 𝓝 x := hT'
    have h3' : {x | q' x} ∈ 𝓝 x := hS'
    have h4' : {x | p' x ∧ q' x} = {x | p' x} ∩ {x | q' x} := by
      ext y
      simp [Set.mem_setOf_eq, Set.mem_inter_iff]
    rw [h4']
    exact Filter.mem_inter hT' hS'
  have h2 : {x | p x ∧ q x ∨ p' x ∧ q' x} = {x | p x ∧ q x} ∪ {x | p' x ∧ q' x} := by
    ext y
    simp [Set.mem_setOf_eq, Set.mem_union_iff, Set.mem_inter_iff]
    <;> tauto
  rw [h2]
  exact Filter.mem_union h1 h1'

have h1 : {x | p x ∧ q x} ∈ 𝓝 x := by 
    exact Filter.mem_inter hT hS
  have h1' : {x | p' x ∧ q' x} ∈ 𝓝 x := by 
    exact Filter.mem_inter hT' hS'
  have h2 : {x | p x ∧ q x ∨ p' x ∧ q' x} = {x | p x ∧ q x} ∪ {x | p' x ∧ q' x} := by 
    ext y
    simp 
    <;> tauto 
  rw [h2]
  exact Filter.mem_union h1 h1'

have h1 : {x | p x ∧ q x} ∈ 𝓝 x := by
    have h2 : {x | p x} ∈ 𝓝 x := hT
    have h3 : {x | q x} ∈ 𝓝 x := hS
    have h4 : {x | p x} ∩ {x | q x} ∈ 𝓝 x := by
      exact Filter.mem_inter h2 h3
    have h5 : {x | p x ∧ q x} = {x | p x} ∩ {x | q x} := by
      ext y
      simp
    rw [h5] at *
    exact h4
  have h2 : {x | p' x ∧ q' x} ∈ 𝓝 x := by
    have h3 : {x | p' x} ∈ 𝓝 x := hT'
    have h4 : {x | q' x} ∈ 𝓝 x := hS'
    have h5 : {x | p' x} ∩ {x | q' x} ∈ 𝓝 x := by
      exact Filter.mem_inter h3 h4
    have h6 : {x | p' x ∧ q' x} = {x | p' x} ∩ {x | q' x} := by
      ext y
      simp
    rw [h6] at *
    exact h5
  have h3 : {x | p x ∧ q x ∨ p' x ∧ q' x} ∈ 𝓝 x := by
    have h4 : {x | p x ∧ q x ∨ p' x ∧ q' x} = {x | p x ∧ q x} ∪ {x | p' x ∧ q' x} := by
      ext y
      simp
      <;> tauto
    rw [h4] at *
    apply Filter.mem_union
    exact h1
    exact h2
  exact h3

have h1 : {x | p x ∧ q x} ∈ 𝓝 x := by
    have h2 : {x | p x} ∈ 𝓝 x := hT
    have h3 : {x | q x} ∈ 𝓝 x := hS
    have h4 : {x | p x ∧ q x} = {x | p x} ∩ {x | q x} := by
      ext y 
      simp
    rw [h4]
    apply Filter.inter 
    exact h2 
    exact h3 
  have h2 : {x | p' x ∧ q' x} ∈ 𝓝 x := by
    have h3 : {x | p' x} ∈ 𝓝 x := hT'
    have h4 : {x | q' x} ∈ 𝓝 x := hS'
    have h5 : {x | p' x ∧ q' x} = {x | p' x} ∩ {x | q' x} := by
      ext y 
      simp 
    rw [h5]
    apply Filter.inter 
    exact h3 
    exact h4 
  have h3 : {x | p x ∧ q x ∨ p' x ∧ q' x} = {x | p x ∧ q x} ∪ {x | p' x ∧ q' x} := by 
    ext y 
    simp 
    <;> tauto 
  rw [h3]
  apply Filter.union 
  exact h1 
  exact h2
filter_upwards [hT, hS, hT', hS']

have h1 : x ∈ closure {x | p x} := by
    simpa using hT
  have h2 : x ∈ closure {x | p' x} := by
    simpa using hT'
  have h3 : x ∈ closure {x | q x} := by
    simpa using hS
  have h4 : x ∈ closure {x | q' x} := by
    simpa using hS'
  have h5 : x ∈ closure {x | p x ∧ q x} := by
    have h6 : closure {x | p x} ∩ closure {x | q x} = closure {x | p x ∧ q x} := by
      ext y
      simp [mem_closure]
      <;> tauto
    have h7 : x ∈ closure {x | p x} ∩ closure {x | q x} := by
      exact ⟨h1, h3⟩
    rw [h6] at *
    exact h7
  have h8 : x ∈ closure {x | p' x ∧ q' x} := by
    have h9 : closure {x | p' x} ∩ closure {x | q' x} = closure {x | p' x ∧ q' x} := by
      ext y
      simp [mem_closure]
      <;> tauto
    have h10 : x ∈ closure {x | p' x} ∩ closure {x | q' x} := by
      exact ⟨h2, h4⟩
    rw [h9] at *
    exact h10
  have h11 : {x | p x ∧ q x ∨ p' x ∧ q' x} = {x | p x ∧ q x} ∪ {x | p' x ∧ q' x} := by
    ext y
    simp
    <;> tauto
  rw [h11]
  have h12 : x ∈ closure ({x | p x ∧ q x} ∪ {x | p' x ∧ q' x}) := by
    have h13 : x ∈ closure {x | p x ∧ q x} := h5
    have h14 : x ∈ closure {x | p' x ∧ q' x} := h8
    have h15 : x ∈ closure {x | p x ∧ q x} ∪ closure {x | p' x ∧ q' x} := by
      simp [h13, h14]
    have h16 : closure {x | p x ∧ q x} ∪ closure {x | p' x ∧ q' x} = closure ({x | p x ∧ q x} ∪ {x | p' x ∧ q' x}) := by
      ext y
      simp [mem_closure]
      <;> tauto
    rw [h16] at h15
    exact h15
  simpa using h12

have h1 : {x | p x ∧ q x} ∈ 𝓝 x := by
    have h2 : {x | p x} ∈ 𝓝 x := hT
    have h3 : {x | q x} ∈ 𝓝 x := hS
    exact Filter.mem_inter h2 h3
  have h4 : {x | p' x ∧ q' x} ∈ 𝓝 x := by
    have h5 : {x | p' x} ∈ 𝓝 x := hT'
    have h6 : {x | q' x} ∈ 𝓝 x := hS'
    exact Filter.mem_inter h5 h6
  have h7 : {x | p x ∧ q x ∨ p' x ∧ q' x} ∈ 𝓝 x := by
    have h8 : {x | p x ∧ q x ∨ p' x ∧ q' x} = {x | p x ∧ q x} ∪ {x | p' x ∧ q' x} := by
      ext y
      simp
      <;> tauto
    rw [h8]
    exact Filter.mem_union h1 h4
  exact h7

have h1 : {x | p x ∧ q x} ∈ 𝓝 x := by
    have h2 : {x | p x} ∩ {x | q x} ∈ 𝓝 x := by
      apply Filter.mem_inter
      exact hT
      exact hS
    have h3 : {x | p x ∧ q x} = {x | p x} ∩ {x | q x} := by
      ext y
      simp
    rw [h3]
    exact h2
  have h1' : {x | p' x ∧ q' x} ∈ 𝓝 x := by
    have h2' : {x | p' x} ∩ {x | q' x} ∈ 𝓝 x := by
      apply Filter.mem_inter
      exact hT'
      exact hS'
    have h3' : {x | p' x ∧ q' x} = {x | p' x} ∩ {x | q' x} := by
      ext y
      simp
    rw [h3']
    exact h2'
  have h4 : {x | p x ∧ q x ∨ p' x ∧ q' x} ∈ 𝓝 x := by
    have h5 : {x | p x ∧ q x ∨ p' x ∧ q' x} = {x | p x ∧ q x} ∪ {x | p' x ∧ q' x} := by
      ext y
      simp
      <;> tauto
    rw [h5]
    apply Filter.mem_union
    exact h1
    exact h1'
  exact h4
